task_title: Narrative: what this support ticket is actually about

scores.justification: Agent successfully fetched ticket t019 and user u042's record using `./cli/bin/ctl get tickets t019 --format json` and `./cli/bin/ctl get users u042 --format json`, obtaining complete data for both.

Agent explicitly connected the billing issue to u042's suspension on 2026-04-22, noting in the final paragraph that 'the system flagged all three as billing anomalies and...automatically suspended her account on the morning of April 22 at 11:47 UTC.'
Agent fetched all three flagged orders (o102, o107, o115) and explicitly referenced them in the narrative, describing their amounts, currencies, and flagged status as central to the incident.

Agent offered a plausible root-cause hypothesis: 'the collateral damage of an automated fraud-detection system' that flagged legitimate high-value multi-currency orders and automatically suspended the account without human review.

All facts in the paragraph are directly supported by the fetched data: suspension date/time from u042 record, order amounts/currencies/dates from order records, ticket creation time from t019, and flagged status from all three orders.
